Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student in the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

parentPhoneNumber.description: Parent's phone number for SMS and WhatsApp notifications.

complaintCount.description: The number of approved complaints against the student.

Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description: Represents a public announcement for students.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Announcement entity.

imageUrl.description: Optional image URL for the announcement.

Teacher.title: Teacher
Teacher.description: Represents a teacher in the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Teacher entity.

CounselingSession.title: CounselingSession
CounselingSession.description: Represents a counseling session scheduled for a student.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CounselingSession entity.

studentName.description: Name of the student for display purposes.

teacherId.description: ID of the teacher for the session.

teacherName.description: Name of the teacher for display purposes.

dateScheduled.description: Date and time of the counseling session.

Fine.title: Fine
Fine.description: Represents a fine issued to a student.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Fine entity.

isPaid.description: Indicates whether the fine has been paid.

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.description: Represents an administrator in the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Admin entity.

Complaint.title: Complaint
Complaint.description: Represents a complaint filed about a student.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Complaint entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the student the complaint is about.

studentName.description: Name of the student the complaint is about.

filedById.description: The Auth UID of the user who filed the complaint.

filedByName.description: The name of the user who filed the complaint.

TeacherAvailability.title: TeacherAvailability
TeacherAvailability.description: Defines a teacher's available days and time slots for counseling.

id.description: Unique identifier for the availability entry.

availableDays.description: Days of the week the teacher is available.

availableSlots.description: Time slots the teacher is available.

VolunteerApplication.title: VolunteerApplication
VolunteerApplication.description: Represents a student's application to volunteer for an event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the VolunteerApplication entity.

studentId.description: The registration number of the student applying.

studentName.description: The name of the student applying.

eventName.description: The name of the event the student is volunteering for.

reason.description: The student's reason for wanting to volunteer.

status.description: The current status of the application.

dateApplied.description: The date the application was submitted.

definition.description: Collection to store admin roles. Existence of a document for a given UID grants admin privileges.

params.name: adminId
params.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the admin user.

definition.description: Collection to store teacher data.  Existence of a document grants teacher privileges.

params.name: teacherId
params.description: The unique ID of the teacher.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique ID of the student.

params.name: announcementId
params.description: The unique ID of the announcement.

definition.description: Top-level collection for all complaints, for admin/teacher overview.

params.name: complaintId
params.description: The unique ID of the complaint.

definition.description: Subcollection to store counseling sessions scheduled for each student.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID (student ID) of the student for whom the session is scheduled.

params.name: counselingSessionId
params.description: The unique ID of the counseling session.

definition.description: Subcollection to store fines issued to each student.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID (student ID) of the student who received the fine.

params.name: fineId
params.description: The unique ID of the fine.

definition.description: Subcollection to store complaints. For filers, it's their history. For students, it's approved complaints against them.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Auth UID of the user.

params.name: complaintId
params.description: The unique ID of the complaint.

definition.description: Collection to store teacher availability for counseling sessions.

params.name: availabilityId
params.description: The unique ID of the availability entry.

definition.description: Top-level collection for all volunteer applications, for admin overview.

params.name: applicationId
params.description: The unique ID of the volunteer application.

definition.description: Subcollection to store volunteer applications submitted by each student.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID (student auth ID) of the student who applied.

params.name: applicationId
params.description: The unique ID of the volunteer application.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure is designed to ensure authorization independence, clarity, and scalability. It leverages denormalization and structural segregation to simplify security rules and enable atomic operations. The design incorporates explicit state modeling and consistent naming conventions for improved debuggability and maintainability.

**Authorization Independence:** Authorization is enforced without relying on hierarchical `get()` calls, which could compromise atomic operations. For collaborative data, a membership map (`members`) is used. For user-owned data, the path-based ownership is applied. 

**QAPs Support:** The structure supports secure `list` operations (QAPs) by segregating data based on access requirements and using dedicated collections for global roles. Segregation of `announcements` enables public list access while private student data is secured by user-specific paths.

The structure includes collections for `admins`, `teachers`, `students`, `announcements`, `counselingSessions`, and `fines`. Admin roles are managed through a dedicated `/roles_admin/{uid}` collection, using existence checks in security rules. Teacher roles are managed through a dedicated `/teachers/{teacherId}` collection, again using existence checks. Student-specific data, such as counseling sessions and fines, are stored under `/users/{userId}/counselingSessions/{counselingSessionId}` and `/users/{userId}/fines/{fineId}`, respectively, to ensure proper data ownership and authorization.
